creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Yes, there was slight change in tor behavior that led to problems when it
was started as a daemon via the rc script.  FYI, there was a discussion
at the tor bugtracker:

https://bugs.torproject.org/flyspray/index.php?do=details&id=882

where the developers confirmed the nature of the problem.  There is a better
warning when this happens incorporated in 0.2.1.9.  I didn't notice this
because I never use the rc script.  Sorry.  :(

b.
